message:
feat: add --state as hidden alias for --status in bd list (bd-9h3w)

Desire path: users naturally try `bd list --state open` but the flag
is called --status. Add --state as a hidden alias following the same
pattern as --filter-parent (alias for --parent).

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
